strategies.name: Street tree planting
strategies.description: Canopy trees on adjacent streets — shading plus evapotranspiration
strategies.evidence: -2.6C air (US avg); -8.2C PET per street tree; -0.13C LST per 10% canopy (EU coefficient, Nature Comms 2021)

cost.description: Per mature tree; includes planting, establishment

strategies.name: Cool / white roof retrofitting
strategies.description: High-albedo roof coatings on flat dark roofs
strategies.evidence: Up to -40C roof surface; -1.7C surface UHI at 50% coverage, albedo 0.65 (IOP 2014)

cost.description: Material + labor for roof coating application

strategies.name: De-paving + pocket greening
strategies.description: Replace sealed asphalt with permeable planted surfaces (Eixample courtyard model)
strategies.evidence: Eixample measured: 1%->15% permeable = -5C surface (~ -0.36C per +1% permeable)

cost.description: De-paving, soil prep, planting, permeable surface material

strategies.name: Shade sails, pergolas & awnings
strategies.description: Engineered shade over sidewalks and plazas (Eixample awning tradition)
strategies.evidence: -50% mean radiant temperature under shade; -5 to -15C UTCI at noon (Mediterranean)

strategies.name: Ventilation corridor opening
strategies.description: Traffic calming + street greening to channel cooler peripheral air
strategies.evidence: Superblocks measured -0.4C ambient (Urban Ecology Agency); corridor trees -3.2C max

cost.description: Urban design, traffic reordering infrastructure, planting

strategies.name: Climate shelter designation
strategies.description: Equip nearby public buildings as refugis climatics (26C, water, rest areas)
strategies.evidence: Barcelona network: 368 shelters by 2024; protective for elderly/isolated residents

cost.description: Equipment, signage, staff training, ongoing operations

metadata.notes: Costs are indicative and vary by region, local market, and implementation timeline. All thermal impacts are drawn from peer-reviewed literature.
